hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':'Pre-deploy code-review gate (robinhood-agent, live trading): run /code-review on the working diff and fix findings BEFORE deploying to prod. Then re-run prefixed with REVIEWED=1, e.g. REVIEWED=1 bun ~/.bun/bin/vercel deploy --prod'}})) if ('vercel' in c and '--prod' in c and 'REVIEWED=1' not in c) else None"
